user.title: Add plant
user.description: Start by naming your plant and decide whether to use OpenPlantBook to find a species match.

openplantbook_lookup.title: Find species
openplantbook_lookup.description: Search OpenPlantBook using a common or scientific plant name.

openplantbook_match.title: Choose species
openplantbook_match.description: Select the closest OpenPlantBook match for your plant.

details.title: Plant details
details.description: Review the matched species, image settings, and care thresholds before saving.
